title: PIFCO 1.7L Black Kettle - Cordless Design, Perfect for Kitchens, Office, or University, Fast Boil Appliance for Daily Use, Compact and Affordable Electric Kettle
features: Home Essential The PIFCO Black Cordless Kettle is made for everyday use, makes tea breaks a pleasure. It heats up fast and is designed to serve up to 7 cups of tea. It is also a low energy kettle.

Functionalities & Features PIFCO Electric Kettle convenient and safe to use at home and/or at the office, this product has an auto shut-off function with dry boil protection. This black kettle includes a washable filter with a manual lid opening and a switch with a light indicator.

Ergonomic & Convenient Design Lightweight and compact, it has an ergonomic spout for pouring water without splashes or unwanted spills. The handle allows comfortable lift and grip. Check water levels without lifting the lid with the water level windows on each side of the kettle.
Stylish Design Uplift your space with the PIFCO Electric Kettle. Showcasing a bold black colour, this electric kettle will match any kitchen interior.

Customer Satisfaction At PIFCO, we value your satisfaction. Our products are engineered with convenience & practicality in mind and come with a 1-year guarantee. Our helpline and email support can assist you with product-related queries and questions. Please be advised base is inside the kettle.
description: Product Description About PIFCO From the first oil-filled heaters to developments in lighting and domestic appliances, PIFCO have been experts in electricals for over 100 years. PIFCO is a household name, trusted by millions to provide cleaning, heating, and lighting solutions. PIFCO products have a place in the heart and history of UK domestic appliances. PIFCO 1.7L Black Kettle This black electric kettle is the perfect appliance for any kitchen. With a 1.7L capacity, it boils water quickly, making it ideal for tea, coffee, and more. The sleek black kettle design fits any modern space, while its cordless feature offers convenience. Safe and reliable, it comes with auto shut-off and boil-dry protection. Whether for daily use at home or the office, this kettle black is a must-have for fast and efficient boiling. Sleek black electric kettle with 1.7L capacity, perfect for kitchens, offices, or uni dorms. Fast boiling for daily use. Affordable cordless kettle ideal for electric kettles clearance. Compact and efficient for any kitchen or office. Stylish black kettle with safety features, perfect for home, uni, or office. A reliable appliance for daily use. Lightweight black kettles electric, designed for fast boiling in any kitchen. The perfect electric kettle for daily use. Efficient and Fast Boiling – Ideal for Daily Use This black electric kettle has a 1.7L capacity, allowing you to boil up to 7 cups of water in just minutes. With 2200W of power, it’s the perfect appliance for busy mornings, quickly boiling water for multiple cups of tea or coffee. Whether you're making breakfast in your kitchen, preparing a quick coffee in your office, or need hot water for noodles in your uni dorm, this kettle black has you covered. Safety First – Auto Shut-Off and Boil-Dry Protection Safety is a top priority with the PIFCO Black Kettle. This electric kettle features boil-dry protection and auto shut-off, ensuring that the kettle turns off automatically when the water reaches boiling point or if the kettle is turned on without water. These safety features make it a reliable appliance for families, students, and professionals, giving you peace of mind during daily use. Cordless Design for Convenience The cordless kettle design offers incredible convenience, allowing you to easily pour and move the kettle without the hassle of a power cord. The kettle sits on a sturdy, non-slip base that provides extra stability on any surface, making it a great fit for kitchens, offices, and university environments. The compact and lightweight design ensures it can fit neatly into even the smallest spaces, making it perfect for uni students living in tight quarters.
